name: Canvas2D Flappy
description: Reusable, config-driven 'flap through the gaps' arcade game (Flappy Bird style): gravity + tap-to-flap physics, scrolling pipe pairs with a gap, score per pipe passed, collision with pipes/ground/ceiling ends the run, optional multiple lives. Procedural fallback graphics; standalone browser export.
capabilities: endless scrolling pipe pairs with a configurable gap and spacing
collision with pipes, ground and ceiling ends the run
tap to flap: Space / ArrowUp / Enter / click
standalone export (relative paths, no server calls)
constraints: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only — no Node, npm or frameworks
configuration-driven: generators produce JSON matching schema.json, never runtime code
relative asset paths only; missing sprites fall back to procedural drawings
